zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Bigelow於1614年出生在英國素福爾可萊塔姆時，她的父親Robert Baguley36歲，母親Jane Wrentham Cummings32歲。她和Richard Butler至少有6個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1691年9月11日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德哈特福德享年77歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德哈特福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Bigelow于1614年出生在英国素福爾可萊塔姆时，她的父亲Robert Baguley36岁，母亲Jane Wrentham Cummings32岁。她和Richard Butler至少有6个儿子和3个女儿。她去世于1691年9月11日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德哈特福德享年77岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德哈特福德。

nameMeanings.name: Bigelow
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English or Irish: perhaps a variant of English   Bigley   or Irish   Begley  .

variants.name: Biglow
meanings: English or Irish: variant of   Bigelow  .

variants.name: Bigley
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Bickley   or   Beckley  , with voicing of /k/ to /g/.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Bigelow was born in 1614, in Wrentham, Suffolk, England, her father, Robert Baguley, was 36 and her mother, Jane Wrentham Cummings, was 32. She had at least 6 sons and 3 daughters with Richard Butler. She died on 11 September 1691, in Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 77, and was buried in Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Bigelow est née en 1614, à Wrentham, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Robert Baguley, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Jane Wrentham Cummings, avait 32 ans. Elle a eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles avec Richard Butler. Elle est décédée le 11 septembre 1691, à Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterrée à Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Bigelow è nata il nel 1614 nel Wrentham, Suffolk, England, sua padre, Robert Baguley, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Jane Wrentham Cummings, aveva 32 anni. Lei avuto almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie con Richard Butler. Morì il 11 settembre 1691, nel Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 77 anni, e fu sepolta a Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Bigelowが1614年にイギリススフォルクウレンサムで生まれた時，父Robert Baguleyは36歳，母Jane Wrentham Cummingsは32歳であった。彼女はRichard Butlerとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1691年9月11日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードハートフォードで77歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードハートフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.Hartford, Hartford County, Connecticut C: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 하트퍼드
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Bigelow(이)가 1614년 영국 수폴크 렌섬에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Baguley(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jane Wrentham Cummings(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 Richard Butler(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1691년 9월 11일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 하트퍼드에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 하트퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Bigelow nasceu em 1614, em Wrentham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Baguley, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Jane Wrentham Cummings, tinha 32 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas com Richard Butler. Ela faleceu em 11 de setembro de 1691, em Hartford, Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America, com 77 anos, e foi sepultada em Hartford, Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Bigelow родилась в 1614 г. в местности рентам, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert Baguley было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Jane Wrentham Cummings, 32. У неё было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери от Richard Butler. Она умерла 11 сентября 1691 г. в местности хартфорд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 77 лет и была похоронена в местности хартфорд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Bigelow nació en 1614, en Wrentham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Baguley, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Jane Wrentham Cummings, tenía 32 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas con Richard Butler. Murió el 11 de septiembre de 1691, en Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 77 años, y fue sepultada en Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.
